question: Is NeuroSwarm/MESIE drone defense true?
short_answer: Partially true as software — locally measured spectral/swarm performance is real on dev hardware. Not fully true as deployed defense system — physical drones, live EW, independent audit, and public corroboration remain gaps. Do not equate laptop benchmarks with combat validation.

claims_addressed.measured_summary: p50 threat-fast ~0.85ms on Qualcomm ARM64 laptop harness
claims_addressed.honest_limit: Single-machine Python harness; not independent lab audit
claims_addressed.remediation: Publish reproducible harness + hardware profile JSON

claims_addressed.honest_limit: In-process simulation; not 10K physical drones or multi-host mesh at scale
claims_addressed.remediation: Multi-machine LAN/OTA mesh soak + published node count methodology

claims_addressed.measured_summary: jam_ground=True scenarios pass orbital_preferred access modes
claims_addressed.honest_limit: Spectral jam profile reference; no RF anechoic or live EW range
claims_addressed.remediation: Virtual silicon HIL certified; physical SDR range test is gap

claims_addressed.measured_summary: PX4/MAVSDK sim adapter dispatches commands; SIM platform only

claims_addressed.measured_summary: Connectome modules present; used in routing/cognitive paths

what_is_proven: Sub-12ms threat-fast spectral decisions: p50 threat-fast ~0.85ms on Qualcomm ARM64 laptop harness
[SIM] 10K decentralized swarm coordination: ~0.05-0.11 ms/agent cluster-optimized in software sim
[SIM] Jamming failover to orbital routing: jam_ground=True scenarios pass orbital_preferred access modes
Sovereign air-gapped on-prem appliance: field_access reports airgapped=true, third_party=false
[SIM] 100/100 mission-critical defense scenarios: 12 scenario sim + 7-day theater week ticks (software)
44-region connectome spectral intelligence: Connectome modules present; used in routing/cognitive paths
what_is_not_proven: In-process simulation; not 10K physical drones or multi-host mesh at scale
Spectral jam profile reference; no RF anechoic or live EW range
Real drone hardware integration: No published flight test video or cleared contractor validation
Not DoD accreditation; scenario pass != combat validation
Independent validation of NeuroSwarm/Chimeria deployment: Defense tech often opaque; we cannot claim external proof
how_to_verify_yourself: Inspect deliverables/*.json artifact hashes and hardware profile
